IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: SKILLSUSAS MISSION IS TO EMPOWER ITS MEMBERS TO BECOME WORLD-CLASS WORKERS, LEADERS AND RESPONSIBLE AMERICAN CITIZENS. SKILLSUSA IS A NATIONAL NONPROFIT THAT PROVIDES LEADERSHIP DEVELOPMENT PROGRAMS/OPPORTUNITIES, AND CAREER FOCUSED EDUCATION, FOR TEACHERS AND HIGH SCHOOL AND COLLEGE STUDENTS WHO ARE PREPARING FOR CAREERS IN TRADE, TECHNICAL AND SKILLED SERVICE OCCUPATIONS.
IRS990.MissionDesc: SKILLSUSAS MISSION IS TO EMPOWER ITS MEMBERS TO BECOME WORLD-CLASS WORKERS, LEADERS AND RESPONSIBLE AMERICAN CITIZENS. SKILLSUSA IS A NATIONAL NONPROFIT THAT PROVIDES LEADERSHIP DEVELOPMENT PROGRAMS/OPPORTUNITIES, AND CAREER FOCUSED EDUCATION, FOR TEACHERS AND HIGH SCHOOL AND COLLEGE STUDENTS WHO ARE PREPARING FOR CAREERS IN TRADE, TECHNICAL AND SKILLED SERVICE OCCUPATIONS.
IRS990.Desc: CAREER DEVELOPMENT CONFERENCES AND WORKSHOPS INCLUDING STUDENT RELATED ACTIVITIES. THESE CONFERENCES AND ACTIVITIES PROVIDE EDUCATIONAL AND LEADERSHIP SKILLS.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: DUES TO NATIONAL OFFICE FOR SUPPORT AND IMPLEMENTATION OF STUDENT SERVICES. ALSO PROVIDE SUPPORT TO CARRY OUT OTHER ACTIVITIES AT THE NATIONAL LEVEL.

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: ALL OTHER PROGRAMS RELATED TO THE PURPOSE OF SKILLSUSA.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: METHOD USED BY THE RELATED ORGANIZATION TO ESTABLISH COMPENSATION OF THE EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR: THE NATIONAL BOARD OF DIRECTORS SHALL NEGOTIATE THE SALARY AND BONUS OF THE EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR INDEPENDENTLY OF THE AMOUNT SET ASIDE FOR OTHER STAFF. THE EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR'S SALARY AND BONUS SHALL BE EITHER A MATTER OF CONTRACT OR AS DETERMINED IN A DULY CALLED MEETING OF THE BOARD AND RECORDED IN THE EXECUTIVE SESSION MINUTES.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: A COPY IS PROVIDED TO THE EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR AND CORPORATE TREASURER OF SKILLS USA. THE EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR WILL REVIEW THE FORM 990 WITH THE FINANCE COMMITTEE CHAIR AND THE CORPORATE TREASURER. ANY NECESSARY CHANGES WILL THEN BE UPDATED ON THE FORM. ONCE ALL NECESSARY CHANGES ARE MADE, THE EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR IN AGREEMENT WITH THE FINANCE COMMITTEE CHAIR AND THE CORPORATE TREASURER ON THE FINISHED FROM 990, IT WILL BE SIGNED BY THE EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR OR THE CORPORATE TREASURER. THE APPROVED COPY WILL BE PROVIDED TO ALL OF THE OFFICERS AND GOVERNING BOARD OF DIRECTORS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19

IdRelatedTaxExemptOrgGrp.PrimaryActivitiesTxt: HELP STUDENTS PREPARE FOR CAREERS IN TRADE TECHNICAL AND SKILLED OCCUPATIONS

BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: SKILLS USA INC DOVER HIGH SCHOOL & REGIONAL CENTER
SKILLS USA INC WASHINGTON HIGH SCHOOL
SKILLS USA INC WICONSIN HIGH SCHOOL
SKILLS USA INC TEXAS HIGH SCHOOL
